mining.name: Mining
mining.description: Extract ore and stone from rocks and mountain seams.

woodcutting.name: Woodcutting
woodcutting.description: Fell trees for timber and kindling.

fishing.name: Fishing
fishing.description: Catch fish from rivers and lakes.

cooking.name: Cooking
cooking.description: Turn raw food into hearty meals that heal and satisfy.

smithing.name: Smithing
smithing.description: Smelt ore and forge weapons and armor at a forge.

alchemy.name: Alchemy
alchemy.description: Brew potions and remedies from herbs and reagents.

foraging.name: Foraging
foraging.description: Gather herbs, berries, and useful plants from the wild.

agility.name: Agility
agility.description: Move fast and far; unlocks shortcuts across the land.

swimming.name: Swimming
swimming.description: Cross deep water without the river deciding for you.

bartering.name: Bartering
bartering.description: Haggle keener prices; every deal sharpens your eye for worth.

hunting.name: Hunting
hunting.description: Track and fell wild beasts; the wilds yield to a hunter.

carpentry.name: Carpentry
carpentry.description: Raise beams and shore up walls; timber and stone made whole.

enchanting.name: Enchanting
enchanting.description: Imbue items with magical power and craft enchanted gear at a forge or rune table.

weaponry.name: Weaponry
weaponry.description: Mastery of blades, axes and hafted arms in the press of melee — every stroke bites deeper.

defense.name: Defense
defense.description: Turning blows with shield and stance, armour worn like a second skin.

marksmanship.name: Marksmanship
marksmanship.description: A steady eye and a sure loose with bow, sling and thrown steel.

spellcraft.name: Spellcraft
spellcraft.description: The discipline of shaping raw mana — a deeper well and a surer hand for every working.

medicine.name: Medicine
medicine.description: Binding wounds and brewing remedies; a healer's hands pull the dying back from the brink.

thievery.name: Thievery
thievery.description: Nimble fingers for locks and traps — and the odd unattended purse.
